description_long: This helmet features a glossy dark green shell adorned with a prominent white star on the front and bold white stripes curving around the sides. The helmet has a smooth, rounded dome shape and is equipped with a black, full-face visor that covers the entire front, providing ample facial protection. The lower edge of the helmet is reinforced with a black trim, likely for added durability and comfort. The surface is highly reflective, indicating a hard, polished exterior, likely made from composite materials such as polycarbonate or fiberglass. No visible ventilation openings or external retention systems are present, giving the helmet a streamlined, uninterrupted appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of classic military or retro racing helmets, with a striking, easily recognizable graphic motif.
description: A glossy dark green helmet with a white star on the front, bold white side stripes, and a black full-face visor. The surface is smooth and highly reflective, with no visible vents or fasteners.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the dark green dome and white stripes curving from the sides toward the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bold white curved stripes and the black visor partially covering the front.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the prominent white star centered on the forehead and the full black visor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the white stripes and a clear view of the helmet's smooth, rounded profile.
attribute_graphic_design: Dark green base with a large white star on the front and bold white curved stripes on the sides; retro military or racing style.
